summary: Phase 2 Chiropractic Clinical (Intake & History + Diagnoses) E2E validated. Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_clinical_phase2.py 15/15 passing against the public external URL (history auto-seed from latest completed intake, empty history when no completed form, PATCH flips field_meta.source→provider_edit while untouched intake fields keep source=intake, PATCH exclude_unset, import skips provider-edited fields + returns imported/skipped_fields, import rejects draft form 409, import with no completed form 409, cross-tenant GET/PATCH/POST→404, PATCH without reauth→401, full diagnosis lifecycle incl. 409 double-resolve/reactivate, is_primary uniqueness per (patient, episode-or-null) grouping with orphan primary coexisting, cross-tenant/cross-patient episode_id→400, status_in + episode_id filters, patient role blocked (403/404), summary history_present 0→1 and diagnoses.total/open live). Regression Phase 1: 9/9 still passing. Frontend E2E (group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app → patient bf782ee6) confirms: tab-clinical mounts, clinical-history-card + clinical-diagnoses-card render, old placeholders clinical-placeholder-intake and clinical-placeholder-diagnoses are REMOVED, exactly 8 Phase-2 placeholders remain (initial-exam, follow-notes, re-exams, treatment-plans, media, outcomes, timeline, billing-readiness), stat-diagnoses + stat-history (‘On file’) surface live, dx-new-btn opens add dialog, dx-icd10 lower-case submit is normalized to uppercase in the persisted row (M99.01 displayed), dx-submit-btn creates a row with reauth gate, dx-filter-status present, history-edit-btn opens inline edit, history-save-btn PATCHes successfully and surfaces 'History updated' toast with 8 PROVIDER EDIT badges visible in the card.

integration_issues.flow: Clinical writes (POST /clinical/diagnoses, PATCH /clinical/history, and every other privileged POST/PATCH) triggering the global ReauthGate
integration_issues.issue: Same UX wrinkle flagged in iterations 29/30/31: on first submit the axios interceptor hits 401 → 'Confirm it’s you' modal fires, and after reauth the original request is NOT auto-retried — the user must re-click submit. Non-blocking. A queue-and-retry-after-reauth hook would eliminate the re-click across every privileged action in the app.

integration_issues.flow: Diagnosis create — duplicate submit possibility after reauth flow
integration_issues.issue: During E2E, after the reauth modal was confirmed the dialog was reopened and re-submitted, and two rows with identical ICD10+label ended up in dx-list. The first submit that returned 401 should have been fully neutralized, but it appears the eventual retry created a duplicate. Low severity, but worth confirming whether the /api/patients/{pid}/clinical/diagnoses POST is idempotent/de-dup’d on the happy path after reauth, or disable dx-submit-btn while a pending request is in flight.

issues: stat-diagnoses and stat-history update via optimistic summary re-fetch on tab mount but the 'Synced …' timestamp lags until the next mount — same cosmetic finding as iteration 31 for Open/Total episodes.

Input keeps the user's lower-case characters in the field value (e.g. 'm99.01') until submit — the spec says 'ICD-10 field is forced uppercase'. Server normalizes on save so the persisted row displays M99.01, but the input itself does not uppercase keystrokes live. Minor UX — either apply a controlled transform (onChange→toUpperCase) or apply CSS text-transform:uppercase on the input.
React warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' for DialogContent — a11y nit; add DialogDescription or aria-describedby.

verified_flows: Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_clinical_phase2.py — 15/15 passing against https://ccms-clinic-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/api
Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_clinical_phase1.py — 9/9 regression still green
GET /clinical/history auto-seeds from latest completed intake; field_meta.source=intake + source_form_id set
GET /clinical/history with no completed form → empty history (field_meta={}, seeded_from_form_id null)
PATCH /clinical/history flips touched field source to provider_edit while untouched intake fields retain source=intake
PATCH /clinical/history is exclude_unset — omitted fields untouched
POST /clinical/history/import skips provider-edited fields, imports missing-or-intake-sourced fields, returns imported_fields + skipped_fields + updates last_imported_at
POST /clinical/history/import with draft form_id → 409; with no completed form available → 409
Cross-tenant GET/PATCH/POST on history → 404 (Default ↔ Sunrise)
PATCH /clinical/history without reauth cookie → 401 'Re-authentication required'
Diagnoses lifecycle — create → read → patch → resolve → reactivate (with 409 double-resolve + 409 double-reactivate)
is_primary uniqueness — one active primary per (patient, episode_id-or-null); orphan primary coexists with episode primary
Cross-tenant and cross-patient episode_id on diagnosis create/patch → 400
Diagnoses list filter by status_in and episode_id; cross-tenant list → 404
Patient role blocked on diagnoses list + create (403/404)
GET /clinical/summary — history_present flips 0→1 after history seeded+edited; diagnoses.total+open reflect live counts
Frontend: tab-clinical renders clinical-history-card + clinical-diagnoses-card; clinical-placeholder-intake and clinical-placeholder-diagnoses are REMOVED; exactly 8 Phase-2 placeholders remain
Frontend: stat-diagnoses + stat-history ('On file') visible on the Clinical Summary stat row
Frontend: history-edit-btn → history-save-btn PATCH succeeds → 'History updated' toast + 8 PROVIDER EDIT badges visible
Frontend: dx-new-btn opens dialog, dx-submit-btn creates a row (after reauth re-click), ICD10 normalized to uppercase on persisted row, dx-filter-status + dx-filter-episode selects render
action_items: OPTIONAL UX: Implement a global 'queue-and-retry-after-reauth-success' hook in the axios interceptor so POST /clinical/diagnoses, PATCH /clinical/history, POST /clinical/history/import, and every other privileged write auto-retries after reauth succeeds — eliminates the manual re-click tracked across iterations 29/30/31/32.

OPTIONAL UX: Normalize dx-icd10 input live (onChange → toUpperCase or CSS text-transform:uppercase) so the field display matches the 'forced uppercase' spec; today the upper-casing is server-side only.
OPTIONAL: Disable dx-submit-btn while a diagnosis POST is in flight (or rely on an idempotency key) to eliminate the possibility of duplicate rows when the user re-clicks after a reauth round-trip.
OPTIONAL A11Y: Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to the Diagnosis and Reauth DialogContent to silence the React a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: services/clinical/history_router.py + diagnoses_router.py — clean scoped_filter → 404 contract; audit events dual-written (clinical_audit_events + global audit_logs) on create/edit/import/resolve/reactivate, matching the Phase 2 spec.

services/clinical/phase2_models.py — PATCH uses pydantic exclude_unset so the field_meta provider_edit flip is correctly limited to the supplied fields; import mapping layer correctly skips any field whose field_meta.source == 'provider_edit'.

core/db.py — unique index on (tenant_id, patient_id) for clinical_history and partial unique for is_primary per (patient_id, episode_id, status='active') would guarantee the invariant at DB level; verify the partial index is actually created (observed behavior is correct so it likely is, or the server-side compensating write handles it).

frontend/pages/clinical/ClinicalTab.jsx — already noted at 768 lines in iter 31; adding IntakeHistoryCard + DiagnosesCard into the tab keeps it modular because the heavy logic moved into their own files — good call.
frontend/pages/clinical/DiagnosesCard.jsx — dx-icd10 input should normalize to uppercase on change (small UX polish) to match the spec wording 'ICD-10 field is forced uppercase'.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of Phase 2 user-facing flows verified end-to-end (cards mount, placeholders pruned to 8, stats live, history edit+save, diagnosis create, filters render)

test_credentials: group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app / Sunrise@ComplianceClinic1 (primary E2E + fixture seeding); admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (Default tenant cross-tenant probe); patient@ccms.app / Patient@ComplianceClinic1 (patient RBAC)
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixtures created ~10 Sunrise-tenant patients (each with optional seeded intake form) plus one Default-tenant patient for cross-tenant probes; all transient and tagged to module fixtures. E2E frontend path created 2 diagnoses (M99.01 'E2E Segmental dysfunction') and one history edit on patient bf782ee6-209a-4812-baf9-2ecd48b5705e — duplicate row artifact of the reauth re-click UX wrinkle, not a backend defect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 clinical backend + frontend is complete and GA-worthy. Remaining chart sections (initial-exam, follow-notes, re-exams, treatment-plans, media, outcomes, timeline, billing-readiness) are still Phase-2/3 placeholders by design. The global reauth-retry wrinkle is a known UX backlog item — manual re-click after 'Confirm it's you' is expected today for every privileged write. When writing new pytest suites, reuse _login(reauth=True) from test_clinical_phase2.py and use CCMS_BASE_URL env var (fallback http://localhost:8001/api). Cross-tenant probes MUST return 404 never 403 for clinical endpoints. Patient-role blocked checks accept 403 OR 404.
rca of the issue: No defect uncovered on the Phase 2 feature set. Only discretionary/UX items: (1) global reauth-retry pattern (tracked from iter 29), (2) dx-icd10 live uppercase, (3) dx-submit-btn in-flight disable to prevent the duplicate-row edge case, (4) DialogContent aria-describedby warning. All 15 Phase-2 backend tests + every frontend Phase-2 acceptance criterion listed in the review request pass end-to-end.
